message:
Replace relative partial imports with @partials alias

Fix malformed import paths like '../../.../../../../partials/' and
'../../../../../../partials/' by using the @partials/ path alias.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,8 +26,8 @@ names to match the value from the `event_type` field, you need to pass the
 option `selector=event_type:suricata`. The `suricata` parser does this by
 default.
 
-import RawOption from '../../.../../../../partials/ParsingOptionRaw.mdx';
-import SchemaOnlyOption from '../../.../../../../partials/ParsingOptionSchemaOnly.mdx'
+import RawOption from '@partials/ParsingOptionRaw.mdx';
+import SchemaOnlyOption from '@partials/ParsingOptionSchemaOnly.mdx'
 
 <SchemaOnlyOption />

@@ -12,8 +12,8 @@ read_zeek_json [schema_only=bool, raw=bool]
 
 ## Description
 
-import RawOption from '../../.../../../../partials/ParsingOptionRaw.mdx';
-import SchemaOnlyOption from '../../.../../../../partials/ParsingOptionSchemaOnly.mdx'
+import RawOption from '@partials/ParsingOptionRaw.mdx';
+import SchemaOnlyOption from '@partials/ParsingOptionSchemaOnly.mdx'
 
 <SchemaOnlyOption />
